# 示例列表

## 已有示例

- Test Case: [单文件](../examples/010-TestCase.cpp)
- Test Case: [多文件 1](../examples/020-TestCase-1.cpp), [2](../examples/020-TestCase-2.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE, CHECK](../examples/030-Asn-Require-Check.cpp)
- Fixture: [Sections](../examples/100-Fix-Section.cpp)
- Fixture: [基于类的 fixture](../examples/110-Fix-ClassFixture.cpp)
- BDD: [SCENARIO, GIVEN, WHEN, THEN](../examples/120-Bdd-ScenarioGivenWhenThen.cpp)
- Listener: [Listeners](../examples/210-Evt-EventListeners.cpp)
- Configuration: [提供你自己的输出流](../examples/231-Cfg-OutputStreams.cpp)
- Generators: [创建你自己的 generator](../examples/300-Gen-OwnGenerator.cpp)
- Generators: [在 GENERATE 表达式中使用 map 转换类型](../examples/301-Gen-MapTypeConversion.cpp)
- Generators: [使用输入值表运行测试](../examples/302-Gen-Table.cpp)
- Generators: [在 generator 表达式中使用变量](../examples/310-Gen-VariablesInGenerators.cpp)
- Generators: [在 generator 表达式中使用自定义变量捕获](../examples/311-Gen-CustomCapture.cpp)

## 计划中

- Assertion: [REQUIRE_THAT 和 Matchers](../examples/040-Asn-RequireThat.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE_NO_THROW](../examples/050-Asn-RequireNoThrow.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE_THROWS](../examples/050-Asn-RequireThrows.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE_THROWS_AS](../examples/070-Asn-RequireThrowsAs.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH](../examples/080-Asn-RequireThrowsWith.cpp)
- Assertion: [REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES](../examples/090-Asn-RequireThrowsMatches.cpp)
- Floating point: [Approx - 比较](../examples/130-Fpt-Approx.cpp)
- Logging: [CAPTURE - 捕获表达式](../examples/140-Log-Capture.cpp)
- Logging: [INFO - 在失败时提供信息](../examples/150-Log-Info.cpp)
- Logging: [WARN - 发出警告](../examples/160-Log-Warn.cpp)
- Logging: [FAIL, FAIL_CHECK - 发出消息并强制失败/继续](../examples/170-Log-Fail.cpp)
- Logging: [SUCCEED - 发出消息并继续](../examples/180-Log-Succeed.cpp)
- Report: [用户定义类型](../examples/190-Rpt-ReportUserDefinedType.cpp)
- Report: [用户定义 reporter](../examples/202-Rpt-UserDefinedReporter.cpp)
- Report: [Automake reporter](../examples/205-Rpt-AutomakeReporter.cpp)
- Report: [TAP reporter](../examples/206-Rpt-TapReporter.cpp)
- Report: [Multiple reporter](../examples/208-Rpt-MultipleReporters.cpp)
- Configuration: [提供你自己的 main()](../examples/220-Cfg-OwnMain.cpp)
- Configuration: [编译期配置](../examples/230-Cfg-CompileTimeConfiguration.cpp)
- Configuration: [运行期配置](../examples/240-Cfg-RunTimeConfiguration.cpp)
